title: Include email recipient's address in "update via email"
excerpt: When using “update via email”, the update should include the emails of the recipients. Just being able to read the topic and text is fine, but doesn’t help if the purpose of using monday is to allow other team members to…

posts.author: SirkElin (elin.hansen@sirknorge.no)
posts.cookedHtml: When using “update via email”, the update should include the emails of the recipients. Just being able to read the topic and text is fine, but doesn’t help if the purpose of using monday is to allow other team members to follow up on an email in your absence - or just simply log the email addresses for future reference.
